title: alpinia breviligulata
intro: Alpinia breviligulata, also known as Short-bracted Galangal, is a species of plant in the ginger family (Zingiberaceae) that is native to tropical regions. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Alpinia breviligulata include relieving nausea and digestive issues, reducing fever, and alleviating respiratory problems. Herbal preparations of Alpinia breviligulata include teas, infusions, and extracts, which can be used to make medicines, and it is also used as a spice in some culinary dishes.
